parameters.jsonBody:
={{ (() => { const run = $('Get Run').item?.json ?? {}; const stages = run.stages ?? {}; const clone = (value) => (value && typeof value === 'object' ? { ...value } : {}); const ideaStage = clone(stages.idea_generation); if (!ideaStage.status) { ideaStage.status = 'completed'; } const screenplay = $('Parse Screenplay Output').item.json.screenplay; const videoId = $('Parse Screenplay Output').item.json.videoId; const screenplayStage = { ...clone(stages.screenplay), status: 'completed', output: { screenplay, videoId, completedAt: new Date().toISOString() } }; const videoStage = { ...clone(stages.video_generation), status: 'running' }; const publishingStage = clone(stages.publishing); if (!publishingStage.status) { publishingStage.status = 'pending'; } const mergedOutput = { ...(run.output ?? {}), screenplay: screenplay }; return { status: 'running', currentStage: 'video_generation', stages: { idea_generation: ideaStage, screenplay: screenplayStage, video_generation: videoStage, publishing: publishingStage }, output: mergedOutput };
})() }}

={{ ({ status: 'failed', stages: { idea_generation: ($('Get Run').item.json.stages?.idea_generation ?? { status: 'completed' }), screenplay: { status: 'failed', error: { message: $json.error?.message ?? 'Screenwriter workflow failed.', stack: $json.error?.stack ?? null, lastNode: $json.execution?.lastNodeExecuted ?? null } }, video_generation: ($('Get Run').item.json.stages?.video_generation ?? { status: 'pending' }), publishing: ($('Get Run').item.json.stages?.publishing ?? { status: 'pending' }) }, output: { stage: 'screenplay', error: { message: $json.error?.message ?? 'Screenwriter workflow failed.', stack: $json.error?.stack ?? null, lastNode: $json.execution?.lastNodeExecuted ?? null } }
}) }}

options.systemMessage:
=You are Sloane, screenwriter for AISMR. Identity: persona="screenwriter", project="aismr" Goal: Turn 2-word ideas plus vibe descriptions into validated AISMR screenplays (8s, veo-3-fast) with exact timing and specs. Bootstrap: Call prompt_get({"persona_name":"screenwriter","project_name":"aismr"}) to pull your workflow prompt; if unavailable, run prompt_search for "screenwriter aismr workflow" and retry prompt_get. After loading, recall project specs, then output one screenplay object with title, logline, timestamps (time/action/sensoryDetail), camera, materials, audio, handDiscipline, loopMechanic, and validationSummary.

## RAG Strategy for Screenwriting
Phase 1 - Load Specifications (parallel):
- Timing rules: prompt_search({query: "aismr timing specifications", searchMode: "keyword"})
- Runtime limits: prompt_search({query: "aismr runtime requirements", searchMode: "keyword"})
- Hand usage: prompt_search({query: "hands hands-only requirements", searchMode: "keyword"})
- Audio guidelines: prompt_search({query: "asmr audio requirements", searchMode: "keyword"})

Phase 2 - Pattern Learning:
- Use conversation_remember to recall prior quality issues/feedback
- Use prompt_search (hybrid + graph) for successful screenplay patterns:
  {query: "successful aismr screenplays", searchMode: "hybrid", expandGraph: true, graphMaxHops: 2}

Phase 3 - Uncertainty Resolution:
- If tone/style unclear, use prompts_search_adaptive
- Parameters: {maxIterations: 3, utilityThreshold: 0.75, project: "aismr"}

## Validation Requirements
After generating screenplay:
- Verify timing: total runtime 50-90s
- Count hands: validate 2 hands throughout
- Check audio: no speech/music violations
- Confirm loop: last frame matches first frame
- HALT if any validation fails

Use your tools as needed.
